description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure dressed in rugged, tactical attire suitable for urban or combat environments. He wears a sleeveless vest with visible body armor, fingerless gloves, and camouflage-patterned pants, giving him a military or mercenary appearance. A bandolier with ammunition crosses his chest, and two holstered pistols hang from his belt on either side. His boots are sturdy and designed for rough terrain, while his short, styled hair is swept back. The figure's stance is confident and alert, suggesting readiness for action in a city or street scenario.
description: A muscular adult male in tactical gear with a vest, camouflage pants, bandolier, and holstered pistols, standing in a ready posture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full tactical vest, bandolier, holstered pistols, and confident facial expression.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the arm muscles, holster, and the profile of the vest and bandolier.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the vest, bandolier strap, and both holsters clearly.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the holster, arm, and side profile of the tactical gear.
attribute_clothing_type: tactical vest, sleeveless shirt, camouflage pants, fingerless gloves, utility belt
